title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Guardian Pharmacy

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Guardian Pharmacy
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Guardian Pharmacy in Gurgaon is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Guardian Pharmacy:
Guardian Pharmacy is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Guardian Pharmacy!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
